# Meeting Note

Meeting Note is a free open-source Windows desktop app that records calls,
transcribes meetings, creates AI summaries, and keeps searchable local history.

Official site: https://ainishanov.github.io/meeting-note/
Repository: https://github.com/ainishanov/meeting-note
Latest release: https://github.com/ainishanov/meeting-note/releases/tag/v0.2.0
Windows download: https://github.com/ainishanov/meeting-note/releases/download/v0.2.0/MeetingNote-v0.2.0-windows-x64.zip

Audience pages:
- Free Windows meeting recorder: https://ainishanov.github.io/meeting-note/windows-meeting-recorder/
- Meeting transcription app for Windows: https://ainishanov.github.io/meeting-note/meeting-transcription-app/
- AI meeting notes app for Windows: https://ainishanov.github.io/meeting-note/ai-meeting-notes/
- Download page: https://ainishanov.github.io/meeting-note/download/
- Install guide: https://ainishanov.github.io/meeting-note/install/
- Privacy page: https://ainishanov.github.io/meeting-note/privacy/

Key facts:
- Platform: Windows 10 and Windows 11.
- License: MIT.
- API keys: users provide their own OpenAI and OpenRouter-compatible keys.
- Data model: recordings, transcripts, summaries, logs, and SQLite database stay local by default.
- Exports: TXT, Markdown, and DOCX.

Feature requests:
https://github.com/ainishanov/meeting-note/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml
